detaileddescription.para: Video buffer management routine.The functions in this file provides an abstraction from the register peek/poke methodology by implementing most common use-case provided by the VDMA sub-core.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 rco 07/21/15 Initial Release 2.00 dmc 03/03/16 Remove xil_print's and report errors via event log 2.10 rco 07/21/16 Used UINTPTR instead of u32 for Address 2.3 rco 02/09/17 Fix c++ warnings
